scripts.db:reset: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Uploads; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Themes; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Users;" && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=schema.sql
scripts.db:reset:remote: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Uploads; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Themes; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Users;" && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file=schema.sql
